title: US Government forces Anthropic to disable its Fable AI models after Amazon pressure
summary: Anthropic suspended access to its Fable models by government order, affecting its deployment in India and other countries.

title: KPMG withdraws artificial intelligence report for containing false case studies
summary: Consulting firm KPMG admitted that its AI adoption report included fabricated cases and withdrew it after accusations of hallucinations.

title: Rio de Janeiro's language model turns out to be a modified version of an existing one
summary: Despite being proclaimed as local development, the city hall's Rio3.5 model is based on Qwen and outperforms its predecessor in benchmarks.

title: US state attorneys general cite OpenAI for security practices in ChatGPT
summary: Several states have launched an investigation into how OpenAI manages the security of its artificial intelligence assistant.

title: More than 1,500 malicious packages detected in Arch Linux's AUR repository
summary: Arch Linux's user repository was compromised with malware affecting thousands of distribution users.

title: Meta reverses $2 billion investment in Chinese startup Manus due to Beijing's demands
summary: Mark Zuckerberg's company canceled the deal with Manus after pressure from the Chinese government.

title: SpaceX surpasses Tesla in market value according to mobility report
summary: Elon Musk's space company has overtaken the automotive company in stock market capitalization.

title: Artificial intelligence companies rush to IPOs with great anticipation
summary: AI startups are going public, attracting investors and reviving the initial public offering market.

title: Switzerland rejects population cap of ten million in referendum
summary: Swiss voters decided not to impose a population cap, allowing free immigration.

title: Scientists identify a cold patch in the Atlantic as possible sign of AMOC collapse
summary: The formation of a zone of anomalously cold waters could be a sign of slowing of the Gulf Stream.

title: FAA changes rules for drone flights beyond visual line of sight
summary: The new regulations will allow drones to be used at greater distances, boosting their commercial application.

title: Villa Baviera: the story of the Nazi refuge in Chile that became Colonia Dignidad
summary: The article reveals the origins of the German colony founded by ex-Nazis in southern Chile.

title: A large study confirms that early menopause dramatically increases risk of heart attack and stroke
summary: The decrease of estrogen in early menopause significantly increases cardiovascular risk.

title: BYD aims to dethrone Toyota in five years with its electric cars
summary: The Chinese manufacturer faces challenges in its local market that could delay its global expansion plan.

title: A submarine finds a whale graveyard at 7,000 meters depth in the Indian Ocean
summary: The discovery of a large deposit of whale remains on the seabed surprises the scientific community.

title: Releasing 500 turtles could green the Sahara desert according to a study
summary: The project proposes using turtles to disperse seeds and restore vegetation in the Saharan region.

title: A map divides countries into those that will become extinct and those that will survive demographically
summary: The demographic analysis shows that the world population will concentrate in a few regions, while sub-Saharan Africa will continue to grow.

title: University students are losing the ability to read with concentration, study warns
summary: Excessive use of digital devices is reducing critical reading ability among students.

title: In the age of artificial intelligence, some argue that software should still fit on a floppy disk
summary: Minimalist currents advocate for lightweight programs that work even on devices with limited resources.

title: Intel unveils new Core 200 CPUs for LGA1700 socket with DDR4 memory support
summary: Intel's Raptor Lake Next processors offer direct competition with AMD's AM4 platform.
